data.body: 6168 oracle authored + RED-verified: test_build_provenance.py (helper contract happy + held-out E2E builds — E2E confirms defect: wheel-from-sdist bakes COMMIT=None today), test_release_workflow_pins.py extended with checks g/h/i (RED).
